scenarios.description: search(term) returns empty list when index does not contain the term (B0 false)
scenarios.precondition: fresh BM25InvertedIndex with no movies added
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is an empty list

scenarios.description: search(term) returns single result for one document containing term (B0 true, loop-1, movie non-null)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex idx with one movie added containing 'hello' in name
scenarios.expectedResult: return list with one SearchResult(docId=1) whose relevanceScore equals computeBM25Score(1,docLength,idf)

scenarios.description: search(term) skips entries with missing Movie object (movie==null branch-false)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex idx stubbed: manually put index entry for term 'ghost' mapping docId 42 without adding movie
scenarios.expectedResult: return value is an empty list

scenarios.description: search(term) returns multiple results sorted by descending score (loop-N, branch-true)
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex idx with two movies; both contain 'test' differing lengths to produce different scores
scenarios.expectedResult: return list of two SearchResults sorted by relevanceScore in descending order
